source_pr.title: makefile: remove install, go get use origin GOPATH
source_pr.body:
`go get` use the origin GOPATH
`go build` use _vendor:GOPATH
`make install` is removed, which is seldom used. 
A problem is that  `go install` never used, and there isn't a GOPATH/pkg, all code is rebuild everytime.

fix issue https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/1778

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: makefile: remove install, go get use origin GOPATH.
fix_pattern: makefile: remove install, go get use origin GOPATH
analysis:
